qa_scores_gpt54.notes: Playable Tetris with solid movement, rotation, drop, scoring and restart flow, but it has notable issues including immediate line removal before the flash effect and the game-over sound being triggered every frame.

qa_scores_opus.notes: Core Tetris mechanics are well-implemented with ghost piece, line clearing, scoring, levels, and next piece preview, but the game over sound plays every frame during GAME_OVER state causing audio spam, and the flash animation removes lines immediately before the flash finishes displaying.

qa_scores_gemini.notes: An exceptionally well-implemented Tetris clone featuring ghost pieces, SRS-like wall kicks, a 7-bag randomizer, and even a synthesized audio system.

qa_scores_gpt54.notes: Fully playable with solid controls and proper Tetris presentation, but line-clear timing/spawn flow is flawed because the next piece spawns before cleared rows are actually removed, which can cause gameplay inconsistencies.

qa_scores_gemini.notes: An exceptionally well-implemented Tetris clone featuring wall-kicks, ghost pieces, a 7-bag randomizer, and even synthesized audio feedback.

qa_scores_opus.notes: Solid Tetris implementation with 7-bag randomizer, ghost piece, wall kicks, soft/hard drop, line clearing with flash, level progression, and persistent high score; minor issues include Enter restarting mid-game instead of pausing, and the soft drop gravity interaction with the main gravity loop could cause double-speed drops.
